testCases.title: Admin — Orders Payment Tab Accessible
testCases.notes: Orders module accessible from admin navigation. Order detail contains Payment tab/section. Admin can view payment status and transactions per order.

testCases.title: Admin — Payment Processors Configured
testCases.notes: 5 payment processors active on storefront: CyberSource, Authorize.Net, Datatrans, Skyflow, Manual. Storefront PAYMENT METHOD selector confirms all 5 configured in admin Settings > Payment. 'Pay with points' is 6th option (loyalty, not traditional payment processor).

testCases.title: Admin — CyberSource Payment Processor
testCases.notes: CyberSource processor configured. Storefront shows CyberSource iframe embedded directly on /cart (unique — other processors redirect to /checkout/payment). Testflex microform v2.0.2 used. Per suite 039 findings: 2 iframes (card number + CVV) from testflex.cybersource.com.

testCases.title: Admin — Authorize.Net Payment Processor
testCases.notes: Authorize.Net configured as 'Bank card (Authorize.Net)'. When selected, redirects to /checkout/payment page (per order-creation-matrix.md). Admin has Authorize.Net gateway settings (API key, merchant ID).

testCases.title: Admin — Datatrans Payment Processor
testCases.notes: Datatrans configured as 'Bank card (Datatrans)'. Redirects to /checkout/payment when selected. Admin has Datatrans gateway settings. Payment flow consistent with non-embedded processors.

testCases.title: Admin — Skyflow Payment Processor
testCases.notes: Skyflow configured as 'Bank card (Skyflow)'. Redirects to /checkout/payment when selected. Admin has Skyflow vault settings. Skyflow tokenizes card data server-side.

testCases.title: Admin — Manual Payment Method
testCases.notes: 'Manual' payment method configured and visible in storefront payment selector. Used for bank transfers, POs, COD. Admin can record manual payment against orders. No gateway integration required.

testCases.title: Admin — Loyalty Points (Pay with Points)
testCases.notes: 'Pay with points' option in storefront payment selector. Loyalty module integrated with payment. Admin can view points balance and redemption per customer. Loyalty points tracked in customer profile.

testCases.title: Admin — Payment Transaction Status
testCases.notes: Order payment transactions stored with status: authorized, captured, voided, refunded. Admin Payment tab shows transaction history per order. Payment status determines order workflow.

testCases.title: Admin — Saved Credit Cards
testCases.notes: Storefront B2B account nav shows 'Saved credit cards' link. Admin manages saved card tokens (tokenized via processor vault). Customer can save cards for future checkout. Card data not stored plaintext (SEC-PAY compliance).

testCases.title: Admin — Payment Capture / Authorization
testCases.notes: Admin can capture authorized payments. Auth-only (reserve) vs immediate capture configurable per processor. Manual capture used for fulfillment-triggered billing. Admin Payment tab shows authorization and capture states.

testCases.title: Admin — Refund Processing
testCases.notes: Admin can initiate refunds from order Payment tab. Refund amount configurable (full or partial). Refund status tracked: pending, completed, failed. Refund creates corresponding return in Returns module.

testCases.title: Admin — CyberSource Preferred Browser Setting
testCases.notes: Per test-suites.json manifest: Suite 039 preferredBrowser=playwright-chrome, browserRequirementReason='cross-origin iframe access failures'. CyberSource iframes require Chrome for full verification. Admin stores payment processor browser preferences in module settings.

testCases.title: Admin — Payment Refusal Handling
testCases.notes: Payment refusal (declined card, insufficient funds) handled gracefully. Admin sees declined payment status on order. Order remains in pending payment state. Customer notified of payment failure.

testCases.title: Admin — Payment Reporting
testCases.notes: Admin revenue dashboard shows $1,080,009,218,461.87 USD. Payment transaction reporting accessible. Revenue calculated from captured payments. Reports filterable by date range, processor, status.

testCases.title: Admin — Tax Collection Compliance
testCases.notes: Tax $20.00 collected on $100.00 subtotal (20% rate). Tax applied after discount (-$0.01). Admin shows tax breakdown per order. Tax records stored for compliance reporting.

testCases.title: Admin — B2B Payment Terms
testCases.notes: B2B organizations (BuildRight) can have payment terms configured. Net 30/60 payment terms allow B2B to purchase on credit. Admin Customer/Org module configures payment terms. Manual payment method used for term-based invoicing.

testCases.title: Admin — Payment Webhook Configuration
testCases.notes: Payment processor webhooks configured for async payment confirmation. Admin Notifications module handles payment webhooks. Real-time payment status updates via webhook events.

testCases.title: Admin — Currency Settings
testCases.notes: Store currency: USD. Admin Stores module configures currency. All payment transactions in USD. Revenue dashboard in USD. Multi-currency support configurable per store.

testCases.title: Admin — Payment Method Availability per Store
testCases.notes: Payment methods scoped to B2B-store. Admin configures which payment methods are available per store. All 5 processors (+ Pay with points) active for B2B-store.

testCases.title: Admin — Void Payment
testCases.notes: Admin can void authorized payments before capture. Voided payment status stored. Order returns to pending payment state after void. Void available for authorized-not-captured transactions.

testCases.title: Admin — Process Payment via Admin
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Manually processing a payment from Admin Orders > Payment tab deferred. Requires specific test order with pending payment state.

testCases.title: Admin — Test CyberSource Card Transaction
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: End-to-end CyberSource test card transaction deferred. Requires CyberSource test card credentials. Payment blocked in Suite 039 (CyberSource Payment).

testCases.title: Admin — Configure New Payment Processor
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Adding new payment processor to admin Settings deferred. Configuration change would affect live store payment options.

testCases.title: Admin — Disable Payment Processor
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Disabling/enabling payment processor deferred. Would affect storefront checkout options for all users.

testCases.title: Admin — CyberSource Capture Without Chrome
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: CyberSource cross-origin iframe card capture verification requires playwright-chrome (preferredBrowser). playwright-chrome not available. CyberSource full payment flow not executable on Edge. Documented in Suite 039.

testCases.title: Admin — Authorize.Net Test Transaction
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Authorize.Net test transaction deferred. Requires navigating to /checkout/payment after clicking Place Order. End-to-end payment placement not executed (no test card credentials).

testCases.title: Admin — Partial Refund Processing
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Partial refund (less than full order amount) requires accessing specific captured order. Test orders with captured payment not available in current test run.

testCases.title: Admin — Payment Dispute / Chargeback
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Chargeback and dispute management in admin deferred. Payment dispute workflow not tested. Requires processor-specific chargeback data.

testCases.title: Admin — PCI Compliance Configuration
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: PCI DSS compliance configuration (tokenization settings, card data policy) in admin Settings deferred. Compliance settings not inspected in this run. Security suite (044) covers client-side PCI aspects.
